summary.description:
Today, cooler for the feels like temperature (down 4.0°C), outside temperature (down 3.4°C), and inside temperature (down 1.7°C) and more moisture-laden outside humidity (up 9%).

Compared to today, yesterday also had noticeable differences in cloud levels (up 803 m).

The past week and month had observable variation in dew point temperature (up 3.6°C), outside temperature (up 5.0°C), cloud levels (up 626 m), and inside temperature (up 3.0°C) when compared to today.

summary.summary: Inside; temperatures should be quite comfortable. Outside; extremely cold temperatures will prevail. Also, dry air conditions likely prevail and slight breezes. Possible light showers, mostly clear skies with high cloud, and it’s dim outside. Little change in the weather.

washing.phrase: It is nighttime; if you have washing out then bring it in as it will probably get damper overnight.
